title: The Understudy WIP
description: Work-in-progress build of The Understudy, a new playable character for Slay the Spire 2. Shared for friend testing. Requires BaseLib.
changeNote: v1.11.4 - Pre-Tuned cards now bake in their own Tuned 1: base damage is one lower and cards preview base+1 (Practice deals 1, Showstopper 28, etc.). One-up and Fate Knocking now start pre-Tuned, so all pre-Tuned cards count each other from combat start (Practice + One-up => Practice deals 2).
